omitted_reference_modules: unrelated product and image-heavy promotion blocks

modules.header: NetEase-style global strip and channel navigation using site name, categories, and GEOFlow search. Archive route is intentionally omitted from navigation.
modules.home.hero: Portal lead headline built from featured/latest article data.
modules.home.featured_list: Text-first news rows using existing article summaries.
modules.home.article_card: Compact list row with category/date metadata and optional initial tile instead of external images.
modules.category.article_card: Health-channel inspired category header, tabs, and article list rows.
modules.article.hero: NetEase article title and source/date metadata block.
modules.article.prose_shell: Readable article body styling for rendered markdown HTML, images, tables, lists, and blockquotes.
modules.article.related_articles: Right rail plus bottom related article list.
modules.article.sticky_ad: Converted from floating sticky ad to a single inline optional ad slot.
modules.archive.overview_row: Falls back to built-in GEOFlow archive templates.
modules.archive.article_card: Falls back to built-in GEOFlow archive templates.
